annotations.label: Real projective space

anchor.snippet: is the topological space of lines passing through the origin

annotations.note: Mathlib has the projectivization of any vector space over a division ring as a set (quotient of nonzero vectors), but no topology/manifold structure is attached, even for `K = ℝ`.

annotations.label: Construction as quotient of R^{n+1}

anchor.snippet: is formed by taking the quotient of

annotations.note: `projectivizationSetoid K V` is exactly the quotient of nonzero vectors of `V` by the scaling action of `Kˣ`, so taking `K = ℝ`, `V = Fin (n+1) → ℝ` recovers the set-level construction (topology not formalized).

annotations.label: Topology from antipodal identification on the sphere

anchor.snippet: has the topology that is obtained by identifying antipodal points of the unit

annotations.note: Mathlib's `Projectivization` carries no topology and no quotient-of-sphere identification is recorded.

annotations.label: Equivalent to disk with antipodal boundary identified

anchor.snippet: is also topologically equivalent to the closed

annotations.note: No homeomorphism between RP^n and a disk with antipodal boundary identification appears in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Real projective line

anchor.snippet: is called the real projective line , which is topologically equivalent to a circle

annotations.note: Mathlib gives a set-level equivalence `OnePoint K ≃ ℙ K (Fin 2 → K)` for any division ring; the file's own TODO notes the homeomorphism (and hence the `RP^1 ≅ S^1` statement over `ℝ`) is not yet formalized.

annotations.label: Real projective plane

anchor.snippet: is called the real projective plane

annotations.note: Mathlib has no named `RealProjectivePlane`; only the generic `Projectivization ℝ (Fin 3 → ℝ)` set.

annotations.label: RP^3 is diffeomorphic to SO(3)

anchor.snippet: is diffeomorphic to SO(3) , hence admits a group structure

annotations.note: No diffeomorphism between `RP^3` and `SO(3)` is recorded in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Antipodal Z_2 action and double cover by sphere

anchor.snippet: The antipodal map on the

annotations.note: Mathlib has no formalization of the antipodal `ℤ/2` action on `S^n` giving `RP^n` as a double cover.

annotations.label: Fundamental group of RP^n is Z_2

anchor.snippet: It follows that the fundamental group of

annotations.note: No computation of `π₁(RP^n)` exists in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Orientability of RP^n

anchor.snippet: is orientable if and only if

annotations.note: Mathlib does not formalize orientability of real projective space.

annotations.label: RP^n as symmetric idempotent trace-1 matrices

anchor.snippet: is in fact diffeomorphic to the submanifold of

annotations.note: No diffeomorphism with the manifold of rank-one symmetric idempotents is present in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Constant positive scalar curvature metric

anchor.snippet: Real projective space admits a constant positive scalar curvature metric

annotations.note: Mathlib does not formalize Riemannian metrics on `RP^n`.

annotations.label: Sectional curvature of round metric is 1

anchor.snippet: For the standard round metric, this has sectional curvature identically 1

annotations.note: Sectional curvature of the round metric on `RP^n` is not formalized.

annotations.label: Measure is half the measure of the sphere

anchor.snippet: the measure of projective space is exactly half the measure of the sphere

annotations.note: Mathlib has no measure on `RP^n`, so this relation to `vol(S^n)` is not recorded.

annotations.label: RP^n is a smooth manifold

anchor.snippet: Real projective spaces are smooth manifolds

annotations.note: No smooth-manifold instance on `Projectivization ℝ V` (or any `RealProjectiveSpace`) exists in Mathlib.

annotations.label: CW structure with one cell per dimension

anchor.snippet: admits the structure of a CW complex with 1 cell in every dimension

annotations.note: Mathlib's CW-complex library does not include a CW decomposition of `RP^n`.

annotations.label: Cells are Schubert cells

anchor.snippet: The cells are Schubert cells , as on the flag manifold

annotations.note: Schubert cells are not formalized in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Morse function exhibiting CW structure

anchor.snippet: the existence of a Morse function would show

annotations.note: Mathlib does not formalize Morse theory or this particular Morse function on `RP^n`.

annotations.label: Tautological line bundle

anchor.snippet: has a natural line bundle over it, called the tautological bundle

annotations.note: No tautological line bundle over `Projectivization` is constructed in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Higher homotopy groups agree with those of S^n

anchor.snippet: The higher homotopy groups of RP n are exactly the higher homotopy groups of S n

annotations.note: Higher homotopy groups of `RP^n` are not computed in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Cellular chain complex and integral homology

anchor.snippet: The cellular chain complex associated to the above CW structure has 1 cell in each dimension

annotations.note: Integral homology of `RP^n` via cellular chains is not formalized in Mathlib.

annotations.label: RP^n is orientable iff n is odd (from homology)

anchor.snippet: RP n is orientable if and only if n is odd, as the above homology calculation shows

annotations.note: Mathlib does not contain this orientability criterion for `RP^n`.

annotations.label: Infinite real projective space

anchor.snippet: The infinite real projective space is constructed as the direct limit or union of the finite projective spaces

annotations.note: `RP^∞` (as a colimit/direct-limit construction) is not defined in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Classifying space of O(1)

anchor.snippet: This space is classifying space of O

annotations.note: Mathlib has no classifying-space theory `BO(1) = RP^∞`.

annotations.label: Double cover is the contractible infinite sphere

anchor.snippet: The double cover of this space is the infinite sphere

annotations.note: Neither the infinite sphere `S^∞` nor its role as a contractible double cover of `RP^∞` is formalized.

annotations.label: Eilenberg–MacLane space K(Z_2,1)

anchor.snippet: The infinite projective space is therefore the Eilenberg

annotations.note: Eilenberg–MacLane spaces are not defined in Mathlib, so the identification `RP^∞ ≃ K(ℤ/2, 1)` is absent.

annotations.label: Mod 2 homology groups

anchor.snippet: For each nonnegative integer q , the modulo 2 homology group

annotations.note: Mod-2 homology of `RP^∞` is not computed in Mathlib.

anchor.snippet: Its cohomology ring modulo 2 is

annotations.note: The polynomial ring `ℤ/2[x]` description of `H*(RP^∞; ℤ/2)` is not formalized.

anchor.snippet: Its cohomology ring with

annotations.note: The integral cohomology ring of `RP^∞` is not formalized in Mathlib.
